title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Enlil and Sud
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Enlil and Sud.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Enlil and Sud.

translation.text: From 'Enlil and Sud': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
